Tutorial — Roanoke onboarding audio
====================================

Track:    tutorial_main.mp3
Composer: Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
Source:   https://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/mp3-royaltyfree/Anguish.mp3
License:  Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0
          https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Required attribution (must appear in credits.html):
    "Anguish" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com)
    Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License
    http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

Notes for downstream agents:
- Loop point: track is sparse enough to loop cleanly. Crossfade 1s on loop.
- Volume: 0.5 base. Engine fades in over 2s on first user click.
- This track is the lone-flute / mystery bed for the Roanoke tutorial only.
- DOES NOT use cedar drum (drum is reserved for Native-character leitmotifs).
